title: MC Starlight LITE
description: For Low End PCs! A RPG ExP from another World! Travel through the Galaxy! Fight Bosses! ⭐💫 Starlight 💫⭐
body:
# Starlight
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
**W.I.P**
Main Object of the Modpack is to Kill all bosses! no End Dimension.

A fantasy RPG adventure where exploration, magic, and combat shape your journey.
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
## 🏔️ Starlight Calls
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
You awaken in a vast, mystical world filled with wonders and dangers.
As you take your first steps, you discover ancient ruins, hidden dungeons, and breathtaking landscapes.
Your adventure will take you across diverse biomes, from lush forests to desolate wastelands and even the farthest reaches of space.
But the world is not without its challenges. Powerful bosses, enchanted relics, and legendary Weapons await those brave enough to seek them.
This is where your legend begins.
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
## Features
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
- 🔦 Cave Exploration – Delve into deep caverns with Spelunkery, uncovering hidden treasures and deadly traps.
- 🍏 Enhanced Survival – Discover the legendary Super Apple, a fruit with mystical properties.
- 📍 Fast Travel – Mark your journey and teleport with the Waystones Mod for seamless exploration.
- 🏡 Furniture & Decoration – Customize your home with elegant designs from Paladin’s Furniture & Chipped.
- 🧙 Arcane Magic – Master the mysterious arts of Hex Casting to weave reality with your mind.
- ⚔ Soulslike Combat – Wield legendary weapons from Marium’s Soulslike Weaponry and face fierce enemies.
- 🎒 Adventure Ready – Carry your gear with the Traveler’s Backpack, offering storage and utility on the go.
- ✨ Powerful Enchantments – Strengthen your gear with new abilities using Enchantsment.
- 🌍 A World of Wonders – Explore the rich landscapes of Biomes O’ Plenty, each with its own secrets.
- 🚀 Space Exploration – Leave your world behind and embark on interstellar adventures with Ad Astra.
- 🛡️ Expanded Arsenal – Arm yourself with an array of weapons and tools from Arsenal.

![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
### Your Journey Awaits
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
The world of Starlight is filled with mysteries, challenges, and opportunities for greatness.
Will you rise to the occasion and carve your name into the stars?
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
# Starlight lite
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
A lightweight version of Starlight, focusing on gameplay over visuals.

Not every adventurer needs fancy graphics to embark on an epic journey.
Starlight lite brings you the same thrilling RPG experience as Starlight but with minimal visual mods, ensuring smoother performance on lower-end systems.

What’s the Difference?
- 🛠️ Optimized Performance – Fewer visual enhancements for a more lightweight experience.
- 🌍 Same Expansive World – Still featuring Biomes O’ Plenty, Ad Astra, Waystones, and more.
- ⚔ Full Combat Experience – Enjoy the same weapons, bosses, and enchantments without extra graphical strain.
- 🎮 Multiplayer Ready – Play with friends just like in Starlight!

If you want the pure adventure without heavy visual mods, Starlight lite is for you!
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
# 📢 Before updating to a new version, make a backup of your world!
![Star Underline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001d1d427c8a4684d65668d9a886b88c9e9db64c.png)
Each update adds new mods but also removes some, which may cause you to lose items depending on your location.

if you played the pack for 20 Hours or more please leave a review on https://mmcreviews.com/all/modpacks/starlight/

🔹 How to create a proper backup:

Go to the Overworld and store all your items in a chest.
Save and exit the game.
Copy your world folder as a backup.
Update the modpack and start the copied world.
If anything is missing, revert to the previous modpack version and play on your backup.
Stay safe and happy adventuring! 🚀
